package.name: gem_dbw_bridge
package.description:
Real-cart drive-by-wire bridge — translates ROS 2 ackermann commands on /dbw/cmd into CAN frames on can0, and republishes incoming *_STATUS / VEHICLE_STATE frames as ROS topics.
Pairs with the two Teensy firmwares in Software/firmware/. SAME state machine semantics as Sim/.../sim_dbw_bridge for sim ↔ real parity, but emits CAN frames instead of Twist.
